title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, which were pulled from the market following government intervention. Krieger shares insights on how AI-native product development workflows differ from traditional software engineering and defends Anthropic's approach to safety considerations as substantive rather than performative.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, about Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, which were withdrawn from the market after government intervention. Krieger explains how AI-native product development workflows differ from traditional software engineering, and he defends Anthropic's safety considerations as substantive rather than performative. The discussion touches on AI agents, frontier models, and test-time compute.
